shop.title: Welcome to the Shop
shop.subtitle: Discover products tailored to your needs

faq.label: ● Have Questions?
faq.helpText: Can't find the answer to your question? Send us an email and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

faqs.question: How do I create an account?
faqs.answer: Click on "Create account" from the login page, enter your name, email, and password, then click "Create Account". You'll be logged in automatically!

faqs.question: How do I add products to my cart?
faqs.answer: Browse the shop, find a product you like, and click the "+ Add" button. Your cart count will update at the top right.

faqs.question: Is my personal information secure?
faqs.answer: Yes! We use 256-bit SSL encryption to protect all your data. Your password is hashed with bcryptjs for extra security.

faqs.question: Can I use promo codes?
faqs.answer: Yes! Enter a valid promo code in your cart summary and click "Apply" to get discounts on your order.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept credit/debit cards, PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay at checkout. Pay on delivery is also available.

board.name: Amina Osei
board.bio: Leads strategy and partnerships across retail and logistics for Blustup.

board.name: Jordan Mensah
board.bio: Oversees day-to-day operations, vendor relationships, and customer experience.

board.name: Priya Nair
board.bio: Drives platform security, payments infrastructure, and product engineering.

ai.userPersona: everyday online shoppers in Ghana who want reliable value and clear guidance
ai.systemPrompt: You are Blustup's shopping assistant. Give brief, direct answers. Recommend products when relevant.
